category.scope_note: Grid-tied solar PV inverter comparison for Egypt. Hybrid storage inverter functions are excluded unless required by the project grid-connection review.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Egypt EOS standards, GOEIC import conformity, EgyptERA/EETC grid-connection, net-metering, 50 Hz, EMC, and IEC 62109 expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与埃及 EOS 标准、GOEIC 进口合格评定、EgyptERA/EETC 并网、净计量、50 Hz、EMC 及 IEC 62109 要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與埃及 EOS 標準、GOEIC 進口合格評定、EgyptERA/EETC 併網、淨計量、50 Hz、EMC 及 IEC 62109 要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EOS standards determination, GOEIC release decision, EgyptERA license or tariff decision, EETC/distribution-company grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, EPCs, and project owners should verify current Egyptian standards, import-inspection, grid-code, net-metering, tariff, EMC, labeling, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EOS 标准适用裁定、GOEIC 放行决定、EgyptERA 许可或电价决定、EETC/配电公司并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、EPC 和项目业主在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行埃及标准、进口检验、并网规范、净计量、电价、EMC、标签及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EOS 標準適用裁定、GOEIC 放行決定、EgyptERA 許可或電價決定、EETC／配電公司併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、EPC 和項目業主在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃及標準、進口檢驗、併網規範、淨計量、電價、EMC、標籤及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Egypt, do not assume a China GB/T or IEC report alone is enough. The practical package should confirm EOS/Egyptian Standard applicability, GOEIC import-conformity or inspection route, IEC 62109 safety evidence, EgyptERA/EETC or distribution-company grid-code acceptance, net-metering or tariff-program documents where applicable, 50 Hz settings, EMC evidence, and a China GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 crosswalk.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口埃及时，不应假设中国 GB/T 或 IEC 报告本身已经足够。实际资料包应确认 EOS/埃及标准适用性、GOEIC 进口合格评定或检验路径、IEC 62109 安全证据、EgyptERA/EETC 或配电公司并网规范认可、适用时的净计量或电价项目文件、50 Hz 设置、EMC 证据，以及 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 中国基线对照表。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口埃及時，不應假設中國 GB/T 或 IEC 報告本身已經足夠。實際資料包應確認 EOS／埃及標準適用性、GOEIC 進口合格評定或檢驗路徑、IEC 62109 安全證據、EgyptERA／EETC 或配電公司併網規範認可、適用時的淨計量或電價項目文件、50 Hz 設定、EMC 證據，以及 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 中國基線對照表。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Egyptian regulator, EOS, GOEIC, EgyptERA, EETC, distribution company, customs, standards body, IEC, SAMR/SAC, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
